# Synthesis Report — Higher Education Policy Adaptation (GOOD: 3-round iteration)

## Audit Status

This deliverable has completed 3 audit rounds. Round 3 produced zero findings
of any severity. Convergence reached per spec §4.2.

## Synthesis

This report synthesises findings across three case institutions examining how
policy mandates translate into programme-level quality assurance adaptations.
Institutions demonstrate varied uptake trajectories shaped by leadership
capacity and external accreditation timelines.

Section 2 examines regulatory compliance framing; Section 3 examines faculty
engagement; Section 4 discusses cross-institutional comparison. Each section
draws on interview data collected between 2022 and 2024.
